g.text: Model used for picking and implementing tasks (used when launching tasks from the Board TUI)
Model used for explaining/documenting code (used when running explain from the Code Browser TUI)
Model used for batch code review operations
Model used for QA analysis on completed tasks (used when launching QA from the Code Browser TUI history screen)
Model used for direct/ad-hoc code agent invocations (passthrough mode)
Model used for interactive codebase exploration (launched via TUI switcher shortcut 'x')
Models used by brainstorm agent types during design exploration.
Model for exploring solution space in brainstorming sessions
Default launch mode (headless | interactive) for the explorer brainstorm agent type
Model for comparing and analyzing design proposals
Default launch mode (headless | interactive) for the comparator brainstorm agent type
Model for merging and synthesizing design proposals
Default launch mode (headless | interactive) for the synthesizer brainstorm agent type
Model for creating detailed implementation plans from designs
Default launch mode (headless | interactive) for the detailer brainstorm agent type
